ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the country belongs */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which data is collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* Financial year (if different from the calendar year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the indicator */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., percentage) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was last updated */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the indicator (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES indicator_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the specified country and year */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the specific data point */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the specific data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the specific data point was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES indicator_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "parent_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subcategory (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES indicator_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_subcategories_parent_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_subcategory_id") REFERENCES indicator_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity verification */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "uploading_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "upload_method" TEXT /* Method used to upload the file (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_uploading_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploading_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the indicator belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the indicator belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the indicator data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the metadata */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_metadata_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES indicator_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_metadata_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES indicator_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_metadata_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_metadata_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES indicator_sources ("source_id")
)
